13 Milwaukee Ballot Tabulator Seals Broken https://imgur.com/gallery/election-interference-C3X9ouY Election Truth Alliance investigating Election Interference. Sign the petition for recounts. https://www.change.org/p/demand-a-hand-count-audit-of-pennsylvania-s-2024-presidential-election?recruiter=1372137540&recruited_by_id=9ac437d0-217b-11f0-b040-d38df09d7c46&utm_source=share_petition&utm_campaign=share_petition&utm_term=psf_combo_share_message&utm_medium=copylink&utm_content=cl_sharecopy_490476500_en-US%3A7 Anamolies https://docs.google.com/document/d/1whdbN8U3JPQ3mcMhyA8XJt8YDmF9mPQ10t8asNdlrWI/edit?tab=t.0#heading=h.7rcm41m0fs44
Election Truth Alliance investigating Election Interference. Sign the petition for recounts https://www.change.org/p/demand-a-hand-count-audit-of-pennsylvania-s-2024-presidential-election?recruiter=1372137540&recruited_by_id=9ac437d0-217b-11f0-b040-d38df09d7c46&utm_source=share_petition&utm_campaign=share_petition&utm_term=psf_combo_share_message&utm_medium=copylink&utm_content=cl_sharecopy_490476500_en-US%3A7 Anamolies https://docs.google.com/document/d/1whdbN8U3JPQ3mcMhyA8XJt8YDmF9mPQ10t8asNdlrWI/edit?tab=t.0#heading=h.7rcm41m0fs44
April 19 Nationwide Protest Compilation https://imgur.com/gallery/april-19-25-protest-compilation-anti-47th-administration-XpUQIpc For this many people to be protesting, throughout 2025 not just April 19, isn't normal.
April 28 2025 - The White House Each day that continues to pass further pushes the limits.
The 47th regime is compromised and now is the time to rise up.

item.dc:creator: lydecker17

item.title: Living legally in the US for nearly 30 years, Irish woman detained after trip away
item.description: So this is hitting the headlines over here in Ireland, and our government is also getting involved. This woman has been living in the US for nearly three decades legally, has a life and a family, but after a trip back to Ireland to see her sick father, was stopped upon reentry related to a drug conviction 20 years ago. That conviction was expunged, so she got the legal documents outlining this, ICE said, "Sorry it's not good enough, you're getting locked up'. The number of people I know who will no longer travel to the US is astonishing, both from a holiday and business perspective. The amount of tourism that will be lost, the number of PHD students, and future entrepreneurs that will go elsewhere. There will be so many ways that the US will pay the price, on so many levels, that won't be fully understood for years to come.
item.dc:creator: dellyx12

item.title: Meet CONNIE!! Part 1 & in person part 2

I know many are familiar with this one of how they met
But not as many may be familiar with how it's going. So I wanted to share.... CONNIE!! in person. Part 1: The Dolphin show https://youtu.be/19n4K8Hyeiw?si=Fpk72Xmn-BVg_22_ Part 2 : Starting at the 11:13 mark. https://youtu.be/r9E0IDoQAxg?si=jXVRNU_Ct8XDRFHA

item.dc:creator: WazertFromBlueSky

item.title: What Happened Today #87
item.description: ? America is being divided in two. The split isn’t coming. It’s already here. Inside the gates, loyalty buys you protection, wealth buys you access, and history is rewritten by decree. Trump’s inner circle is building a private empire where $500,000 gets you a key to power, human rights offices are shuttered, Indigenous people are erased from public memory, and protest is framed as betrayal. Outside the gates, Americans fight just to keep their health care, their citizenship, and their right to speak. Jeffries and Booker spent 12 hours on the Capitol steps because survival in this system is not guaranteed, and silence would mean surrender. There’s no more pretending this isn’t deliberate. It’s by design. And the walls are rising fast. Don’t trust the algorithm. Get this in your inbox every night, free and private, so you never miss what’s really going on. Add your email in the sidebar. #GovBriefToday #Resist 1. https://go.govbrief.today/columbus-day 2. https://go.govbrief.today/greenland-respect 3. https://go.govbrief.today/colsprings-nightclub 4. https://go.govbrief.today/homan-not-deported 5. https://go.govbrief.today/60-minutes-pelley 6. https://go.govbrief.today/putin-stop-shooting 7. https://go.govbrief.today/800-houthi-targets 8. https://go.govbrief.today/university-collective 9. https://go.govbrief.today/trump-town-hall 10. https://go.govbrief.today/trump-tariffs-taxes 11. https://go.govbrief.today/state-dept-cuts 12. https://go.govbrief.today/executive-branch-club 13. https://go.govbrief.today/capitol-sitin Hey, Imgur, family in town, back for comments late Monday.
item.dc:creator: GeorgeBounacos

item.title: Kingsday OOTD (OC)
item.description:
It was kingsday here in the Netherlands so I couldn’t help but draw my outfit for the day ;D
I am incredibly proud of my socks so here is another scrumptious shot!
As per the rules, Bean tax! If you like my stuff and want to see more, don’t hesitate to support me on Patreon! —> https://www.patreon.com/AmyRevives
item.dc:creator: AmyRevives

item.dc:creator: abbiistabbii

item.title: Voted for my life today, here's hoping the rest of my country did the same... Here's some Pilfered Trans Memes while I panik...
item.description:
Evening to all my Girlies, Boyo's and Beans, I'm back with another dump of Memes for Trans Femme, Trans Masc and Non descript entities as well as some general shenanigans and transphobe mocking. Freshly stolen from the high seas. While I try to be inclusive, please keep in mind that some of these may reflect my own experience as Trans Femme and is not intended to invalidate other's experiences.
Wore my skirt, thigh highs and wig with a hoodie last thursday and food delivery guy seemed to feel the need to get way closer than when I boymode to give me my food that time...
I have a crush on most of the the Girlies and Boyos who comment on my posts :3
Damn you brain!!!
Swedish Chef is trans?
Numbers go BRRRRRRR! NP is happy where I'm at so no changes to routine for now (though I was hoping for Prog and he said maybe in another 6 months :/ ) They did however call me back about my hemoglobin being super low so I gotta go have that looked at... Might explain why I've been feeling super tired and weak.
This concludes this round of meme pilfering. Raids will continue until head pats and snacks are aquired.
item.dc:creator: MelodyLightfoot

item.title: A pose a day: Wearing digitigrade legs and walking
item.description: Hi! I'm AdorkaStock. I photograph myself and others in various poses for art reference. My goal is to include in my galleries of stock poses a variety of body types, skin types, and people doing various things so there is a piece of stock for everyone. I want to share my stock, which is free to use for reference, with as many people as possible in case they need it! FAQ is in my bio. Hope this pose helps you! Happy drawing! #Art #AdorkaStock #Reference #Artist
item.dc:creator: adorkastock

item.title: Boss: Why haven’t you come back to work? Me:
item.dc:creator: CitizenK9

item.title: I have too many memes: Dump #106
item.description:
If you have a player like this, give them a nigh impossible int check to know what an atom is and then a nigh impossible arcana check to have enough control to do that
Why there? Like obviously nothing about this is good and it’s all bad ideas the whole way down, but like, why there? And that big too?
Go to sleep
I know one thing about 40k and it is that orks are so stupid but insanely powerful psychics that they warp reality to fit their thoughts. Their vehicles are filled with junk but they work because the orks think they work. It is the only thing that’s made me want to get into 40k but I just don’t have the energy atm
I really want to buy a high quality mascot costume like this (presumably). If anybody knows where I can get one please tell me
item.dc:creator: Sweenerd

item.title: Terry Pratchett was Born Today in 1948
item.description: Too young, too soon, too needed today (can you imagine what he would have to say about JK Rowling or Neil Gaiman?)
